heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to adoption of a tribal constitution and bylaws and election of tribal officials, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–454, title III, § 308108 Stat. 4795Nov. 2, 1994
